data.title: EastGroup Properties revised Q4 2025 earnings conference call to start an hour earlier at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
data.description: EastGroup Properties, Inc. (NYSE: EGP) has rescheduled its Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast to start at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time, which is an hour earlier than previously announced. The call will take place on Jan. 9, 2026, in Jackson, Miss.

data.title: K Wave Media Ltd (Nasdaq: KWM) notified by Nasdaq of minimum price deficiency as bid price falls below $1/share.
data.description: K Wave Media Ltd. (Nasdaq: KWM), a leading Korean cultural innovation and digital asset company, disclosed receiving a notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on January 7, 2026. The communication cited the Company's failure to sustain a minimum bid price of $1 per share for the November 20, 2025, to January 6, 2026 timeframe, a prerequisite under Nasdaq Listing Rules 5550(a)(2) for continued listing on Nasdaq. This news underlines the potential listing jeopardy faced by K Wave with these numbers.

data.title: Stocks surge as investors weigh rate-cut expectations, with S&P 500 and Dow Jones hitting record highs as market shifts. Venezuela oil supply deal reshapes energy trade. Jobs report signals mixed but reassuring news.
data.description: The first week of full trading in 2026 saw Wall Street performing well, with the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching record highs. Investors remained optimistic despite concerns about potential interest rate cuts later in the year, balancing positive economic data. Market trends showed a shift from big tech companies to more cyclical industries. Stocks in oil and defense sectors surged after the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro in a U.S. military operation. President Trump revealed an agreement for Venezuela to supply 30-50 million barrels of sanctioned crude to the U.S., possibly impacting global energy trade. The focus also turned to potential export controls on Venezuelan oil. Additionally, a mixed but ultimately positive jobs report influenced market sentiment.

data.title: Banks fully embrace crypto as they invest in BTC, stablecoins, and tokenized cash. Wall Street shifting to onchain solutions.
data.description: Major financial institutions have shifted their focus from debating cryptocurrency to actively developing it. This shift is evident in the emergence of tokenized cash and Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) in the financial sector. The trend indicates that Wall Street is increasingly adopting blockchain technology and integrating it into their operations. As a result, the cryptocurrency industry is witnessing significant growth and mainstream acceptance from traditional banking institutions.

data.title: Aon to release Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on Jan 30, 2026 at 6:30 AM ET, with President and CEO Greg Case and CFO.
data.description: Dublin, 9th January 2026 - Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a top professional services firm worldwide, is set to reveal its Q4 and full-year 2025 performance on Friday, 30th January 2026. The results will be shared through a press release at 6:30 AM ET. Greg Case, President, and CEO of Aon along with CFO Edmund will be providing insights.

data.title: Aon plc declares $0.745 per share cash dividend on Class A Ordinary Shares, payable on Feb 13.
data.description: Dublin, January 9th, 2026 - A prestigious global professional services firm, Aon plc (NYSE: AON), unveiled its decision to issue a quarterly cash dividend of $0.745 per share on the company's exceptional Class A Ordinary Shares. Shareholders can anticipate the dividend being distributed on February 13th.

data.title: Positive Phase 2 results of Spevatamig (PT886) presented at ASCO GI 2026 show potential 1st-line treatment for metastatic PDAC.
data.description: In San Diego on January 9, 2026, new information was unveiled at ASCO GI 2026 indicating that spevatamig, an anti-CLDN18.2/CD47 bsAb, along with chemotherapy, could serve as a promising initial treatment option for those with CLDN18.2 positive metastatic pancreatic ductal carcinoma. This data highlights the potential for spevatamig to be a beneficial first-line therapy for patients with this condition.

data.title: Lemme launches Creatine Body Toning Gummies for women's strength and recovery. Founded by Kourtney Kardashian Barker.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, Lemme, the successful wellness company established by Kourtney Kardashian Barker, expands its product line by venturing into the performance nutrition sector. The brand introduces Lemme Creatine Body Toning Gummies, which is a scientifically backed formula accredited by NSF. This product is specifically designed to aid women in their fitness journey.

data.title: Edna Gareh Spousal Trust files early warning, restrictions on US distribution.
data.description: This announcement is not intended for distribution to United States news services and should not be shared within the United States.

data.title: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc. granted 434 shares of common stock to 3 new employees on Jan 2, 2026.
data.description: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for central nervous system disorders, recently awarded restricted stock unit grants to three new non-executive employees on January 2, 2026. These awards, totaling 434 shares of common stock, were issued under the 2024 Inducement Plan. The grants were considered essential inducements for the employees to join Praxis, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
